---
title: "Mark Velthoen"
about: 
  template: jolla
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mark-velthoen-800a9032a/
      - text: Email
        href: mailto:markvelthoen1@gmail.com
---

# Mark Velthoen

Hello! I'm Mark Velthoen, a current undergraduate student at University of California, Santa Barbara. I am studying Hydrologic Sciences and Policy and am interested in California water systems and sustainable water management. Outside of my education, I love to hike, play sports (tennis and basketball) and enjoy sunny Santa Barbara. Check out my website to learn more!
